# criblio_search_dataset_ruleset (Data Source)

SearchDatasetRuleset DataSource

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "criblio_search_dataset_ruleset" "my_searchdatasetruleset" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Ruleset identifier. For Terraform, only <code>default</code> is supported today.
- `rules` (Attributes List) Rules evaluated in order for dataset routing and optional extend. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--rules))

<a id="nestedatt--items--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.rules`

Read-Only:

- `dataset` (String) Dataset id when routing to a dataset; meaning depends on <code>sendDataTo</code>.
- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the rule.
- `disabled` (Boolean) When true, the rule is ignored for routing.
- `extend_expression` (String) KQL-style extend expression to add or transform fields on matched events.
- `extend_expression_enabled` (Boolean) Whether <code>extendExpression</code> is applied for this rule.
- `id` (String) Stable identifier for the rule.
- `kusto_expression` (String) Kusto predicate that selects events for this rule.
- `name` (String) Display name of the rule.
- `send_data_to` (String) Whether matching events are sent to a dataset or dropped (<code>destinationDataset</code> vs <code>drop</code>).
